mapper.select: select id, payment_record_id, order_id, trade_no, callback_no, third_trade_no, pay_status, amount, callback_time, process_status, failure_reason, raw_payload, create_time, update_time from payment_callback_record where callback_no = #{callbackNo}
mapper.update: update payment_callback_record set process_status = 1, raw_payload = #{rawPayload}, failure_reason = null, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and process_status = 1

update payment_callback_record set payment_record_id = #{paymentRecordId}, order_id = #{orderId}, process_status = #{processStatus}, failure_reason = #{failureReason}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and process_status = 1
